artifacts.label: Incoming EBR Submission
artifacts.subject: EBR Submission for Review — AT-2026-0142 Atorvastatin Calcium 40mg Tablets
artifacts.body:
Hi Quality team,

Please find attached the executed batch record for AT-2026-0142 (Atorvastatin Calcium 40mg Film-Coated Tablets, 500,000 units, Lilly Indianapolis).

Manufacture dates: 08–11-Mar-2026. All in-process checks completed. One observation noted in Step 7 (blend time) — within acceptable range per SOP-BLN-004 discretion.

Please confirm receipt.

Best,
Sarah Chen
Senior QA Associate, Lilly Indianapolis

logs.title: Steps 1–5 reviewed — all within specification
reasoning: Step 1 Dispensing: Env 21°C/38% RH  [PASS] | All weights verified  [PASS]
Step 2 Sieving: 60 mesh  [PASS] | Yield 99.8%  [PASS]
Step 3 Pre-Blend: VBL-002 cal current exp 30-Jun-2026  [PASS] | 18 RPM × 10 min  [PASS]
Step 4 Wet Granulation: RMG-001 | Impeller 250 RPM  [PASS] | Granulation endpoint met  [PASS]
Step 5 Fluid Bed Drying: FBD-001 | Inlet 65°C | LOD 1.8% (spec ≤2.0%)  [PASS] | Cal current  [PASS]

logs.title: Steps 6–7 reviewed — 1 OBSERVATION noted (blend time)
reasoning: Step 6 Milling: MIL-001 | 20 mesh  [PASS] | Yield 99.2%  [PASS]
Step 7 Final Blending: VBL-002 | Target: 15–17 min | EBR recorded: 18 min
[WARN] OBSERVATION: Blend time 18 min vs MBR maximum 17 min
SOP-BLN-004 Section 3.2: “Single time point exceedances ≤1.5 min require documentation only”
IPC blend uniformity result: RSD 0.8% (spec ≤1.5%)  [PASS] — product quality not affected
Operator note on EBR: “Blend time extended due to equipment stop for safety check at T+16 min”
Classification: OBSERVATION — documented, within SOP discretion, no product impact

logs.title: Steps 8–10 reviewed — all within specification
reasoning: Step 8 Compression: TBP-003 | Target hardness 8–12 kP | EBR avg 10.1 kP  [PASS]
IPC friability: 0.18% (spec ≤0.5%)  [PASS] | Disintegration: 4.2 min (spec ≤6 min)  [PASS]
Step 9 Film Coating: CTR-002 | Opadry II White | Target weight gain 3.0–3.5%
Achieved weight gain: 3.2%  [PASS] | Inlet temperature 65–70°C throughout  [PASS]
Step 10 Packaging: 90cc HDPE bottles | 30-count | Reconciliation 99.6%  [PASS]
All equipment calibrations current  [PASS] | All operator signatures complete  [PASS]
